intro.npc_text: What. I'm in the middle of something.

choices.text: I need access to the lab.
I'm trying to find HR. Any idea where they are?
I heard you're pretty good at FIFA.

access.npc_text: Lab access requires a cost center code. You don't have one. Raise a ticket. Three to five business weeks.

choices.text: Fine. Different question — FIFA. You play?

access_no.npc_text: No. That's what the process is for. I can't think straight in this open plan anyway. If I had something to block this noise out I might actually clear the backlog faster, but here we are.

hr_response.npc_text: HR? HR has never once contacted IT voluntarily. They don't know we exist. I don't know they exist. It's a mutual arrangement. So no, I have no idea where they are.

fifa_bait.npc_text: ...did you just bring up FIFA while I'm actively working?

fifa_ego.npc_text: Statistically dominant. Forty-three games, zero losses. xG differential plus eleven. But I'm not playing right now. I have six open tickets and the ambient noise in this building is genuinely affecting my cognitive throughput.

choices.text: What would help with the noise?

fifa_noise.npc_text: Better headphones. Mine just suck - I can hear literally everything — the printer, the fridge hum, the receptionist's sighing. It's not a productive environment.

fifa_refuse.npc_text: No. I don't play with randoms. And I have work to do. Come back when you have a ticket number.
